rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Abnormal LSASS Process Access and Injection

rules.rule_text:
title: Abnormal LSASS Process Access and Injection
id: 23fac7e9-3c44-4b76-891b-72c4d44e1964
status: experimental
description: Detects obviously suspicious cross-process events targetting lsass.exe.
  Inspired by the 2022 Red Canary Threat Detection report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/lsass-memory/
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/11/03
tags:
- attack.credential_access
- attack.t1003.001
logsource:
  category: process_access
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    SourceImage|endswith:
    - \powershell.exe
    - \taskmgr.exe
    - \rundll32.exe
    - \procdump.exe
    - \procexp.exe
    TargetImage|endswith: \lsass.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
